I think it needs a quick line on what Nous is. Suggestion:

Okay, money chat… I recently found out loads of experts say we probably shouldn’t be paying more than about £7 for our phone bill. I was paying WAY more than that :sweat_smile:.

Thankfully I've been using Nous, which is basically this really simple tool that saves you money on your bills and does all the work for you.

They checked my bills…phone, energy, broadband, everything…and honestly I didn’t realise how much I was overpaying until they actually checked it properly.

Then found better deals so now I'm saving hundreds of pounds a year!

If your bills feel a bit chaotic or expensive, it might be worth letting them take a look. Worst case you learn something, best case you save money!!!
